Home / Internal Tools & Admin Panels / Alternatives to Airtable

3 open source alternatives to Airtable

Spreadsheet-database hybrid with rich field types and views. Here are the open source projects real teams use instead — ranked by fit, with honest pros and cons for each.

What people don't love about Airtable

  • Price jumps put it out of reach for many teams.
  • API and automation quotas are restrictive.
  • Exporting large bases is cumbersome.

Current Airtable pricing (for reference): Free tier; Team from $20/user/month.

Ad slot — above comparison

Quick comparison

Alternative Best for License Self-host Hosted cloud?
NocoDB
Open source Airtable alternative — turn any DB into a spreadsheet UI. 		Put a spreadsheet UI on top of your existing SQL database. AGPL-3.0 ★☆☆☆☆ Yes
Baserow
Self-hosted open source Airtable alternative with workspaces. 		Clean Airtable-style UX with workspaces and plugins. MIT ★★☆☆☆ Yes
Teable
Postgres-backed Airtable alternative. 		Teams that need real Postgres power behind an Airtable view. AGPL-3.0 ★★☆☆☆ Yes

1. NocoDB — Put a spreadsheet UI on top of your existing SQL database.

Open source Airtable alternative — turn any DB into a spreadsheet UI.

Strengths

  • Works on top of your existing SQL database.
  • Quick docker deploy.
  • Multi-view (grid, kanban, gallery).

Weaknesses

  • UI polish lags Airtable.
  • Advanced automation is in the paid tier.
  • Occasional migration friction between releases.
License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 1/5 Hosted cloud option

NocoDB homepage · Source on GitHub · Airtable vs NocoDB →

2. Baserow — Clean Airtable-style UX with workspaces and plugins.

Self-hosted open source Airtable alternative with workspaces.

Strengths

  • Clean UI with fast filtering and views.
  • Plugins and formulas supported.
  • Good docker deploy story.

Weaknesses

  • Many premium features in "advanced" plugin.
  • Automations are still maturing.
  • Smaller formula library than Airtable.
License: MIT Self-host difficulty: 2/5 Hosted cloud option

Baserow homepage · Source on GitHub · Airtable vs Baserow →

3. Teable — Teams that need real Postgres power behind an Airtable view.

Postgres-backed Airtable alternative.

Strengths

  • Built on Postgres — real database power.
  • Real-time collaboration and Airtable-style views.
  • Active development with frequent releases.

Weaknesses

  • Newer than NocoDB / Baserow.
  • Advanced features still shipping.
  • Smaller extension library.
License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 2/5 Hosted cloud option

Teable homepage · Source on GitHub · Airtable vs Teable →
